task: Take the carrot from the silver vessel and place it above the vessel.
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A silver vessel (pan) sits on a wooden countertop, containing a single orange carrot. The vessel has a flat base and a raised rim; the carrot is a solid, cylindrical object. STRATEGY - First, grasp the carrot from within the vessel. Then, transport it to a position directly above the vessel’s opening. Finally, place it back into the vessel. Failure modes include dropping the carrot during transport or misaligning it with the vessel’s opening. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach into the vessel to grasp the carrot (affordance: the carrot’s body). Step 2: Lift the carrot and move it over the vessel (affordance: the vessel’s rim as a target for placement). Step 3: Lower the carrot into the vessel (affordance: the vessel’s interior).**
Goal: inside(carrot, silver_vessel); stable(carrot)
Scene: silver_vessel, carrot, countertop
Step 1: reach(carrot)
  affordance_region: the body of the carrot inside the silver vessel
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, carrot, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, carrot) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(carrot)
  affordance_region: the body of the carrot
  contact: holding(carrot) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(carrot)
Step 3: transport(carrot -> silver_vessel)
  affordance_region: the interior of the silver vessel
  spatial: above(carrot, silver_vessel, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(carrot)
  done_when: above(carrot, silver_vessel, 0.05)
Step 4: place(carrot -> silver_vessel)
  affordance_region: the interior of the silver vessel
  contact: surface_contact(carrot, silver_vessel) [completion]; released(carrot) [completion]
  pose: stable(carrot) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(carrot, silver_vessel) AND released(carrot)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the carrot inside the silver vessel
the interior of the silver vessel
the interior of the silver vessel
